---
title: "The Iconicity Seminar"
description: |
  Welcome to the website of the Iconicity Seminar, an annual conference dedicated to linguistic iconicity.
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
d-title {
  color:white
  font-weight: 1000;
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 36px;
  background-image: url(Kutchan.jpeg);
  background-size: 100%;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
    text-shadow: 
    -1px -1px 5px pink,  
     1px -1px 5px pink,
    -1px  1px 5px pink,
     1px  1px 5px pink;
}
d-title p {
  color: white !important;
    text-shadow: 
    -1px -1px 5px pink,  
     1px -1px 5px pink,
    -1px  1px 5px pink,
     1px  1px 5px pink;
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

The 4th Iconicity Seminar will be held on 21-23 February 2026 at Nagoya University, Japan, jointly with the 15th International Symposium on Iconicity in Language and Literature.
